scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields (override, type, location, services, labels), correct protocol table with all three types, correct location formats, accurate label/env-var interpolation info, pebble_service auto-label mentioned
scores.hallucination_notes: The charm integration section mentions 'LogProxyConsumer' and 'loki-push-api' library — these are real but not in the gold standard and could be slightly inaccurate in detail. The '-all' syntax for services exclusion is not in the gold standard and may be fabricated. Minor risk items but not definitively wrong.
